expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus as “REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable” and includes a detailed “What phase0 must do” contract excerpt covering REPORT_STATE classification and resume semantics (apply_user_choice.sh modes and routing). It also has a dedicated section: “Assessment: Can we demonstrate “REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable” for phase0?”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase0
expectations.evidence: result.md declares “Primary phase under test: phase0” and the content is scoped to phase0 responsibilities (REPORT_STATE classification, resume semantics, phase0 artifact list). It does not evaluate other phases; it concludes verification is blocked due to missing phase0 runtime artifacts/logs, but the output itself aligns to phase0.
